assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet unless the goal explicitly requires an existing artifact.

developer_goal: Create a Hetzner customer account and Cloud project, provision a first public Linux Cloud server, and open its root shell with an SSH key.

first_success.outcome: Hetzner Cloud has created the first public Linux server and the developer has authenticated to its root shell.
first_success.observable_signal: After ssh root@<server-IP> and any host-authenticity confirmation, an interactive root shell opens.

route_selection.surface: Hetzner accounts registration and Cloud Console server creation
route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: Register Hetzner account then create Cloud server with SSH key
candidates.reason: Exact registration fields, fraud review, and whether payment is mandatory before first server remain incompletely enumerated.

candidates.name: Payment or ID verification branch before first Cloud order
candidates.reason: Fraud-prevention docs show some accounts need extra verification that can block or delay first success.

required_path.action: Register a Hetzner account from accounts.hetzner.com and confirm email.

required_fields.label: Registration identity and contact fields
required_fields.notes: Docs require email, contact details, and billing address but do not enumerate every current form control.

required_path.observable_result: The developer can log in to the new Hetzner account.

required_path.action: Complete any required payment or verification steps before Cloud resources.
required_path.observable_result: The account is allowed to create Cloud servers.

required_path.action: Create a Cloud project and first public Linux server with unresolved defaults.
required_path.observable_result: Hetzner Cloud creates the server and assigns a public IP.

required_path.action: Connect as root with the selected private key.

prerequisites.description: Valid email, contact details, and billing address are required to create an account.

external_gates.description: Fraud-prevention review, optional phone verification, and payment-provider checks can gate first orders.

unavoidable_waits.description: Email confirmation link delivery after registration.
Server provisioning until SSH is available.

platform_outcomes.description: Hetzner creates the customer account after email confirmation.

excluded.reason: Documented as a common next step, not required for first server success.

uncertainties.question: Which exact fields and agreement controls appear in the current direct registration form?
uncertainties.impact: Missing fields prevent a verified required_fields count.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Dated screenshots or DOM capture of accounts.hetzner.com Register now for a fresh user.

uncertainties.question: Is adding a stored payment method mandatory before every first Cloud server?
uncertainties.impact: This changes external gates and path length.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Official confirmation for current Cloud first-order payment policy by region.
